title: mentha longifolia f. flanatica
intro: Mentha longifolia f. flanatica, also known as Indian pennyroyal, is a subspecies of the mint family with a distinctive, long-lasting fragrance. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to act as an antispasmodic, antiseptic, and carminative, helping to alleviate digestive issues and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Mentha longifolia f. flanatica include its potential to aid in weight loss, improve respiratory health, and provide antioxidant properties, making it a valuable addition to herbal remedies. In terms of herbal preparations, Mentha longifolia f. flanatica can be consumed as a tea, added to topical creams and oils, or used in traditional medicine practices to harness its therapeutic benefits.
